selectedSlice: Turn the Global Admin mentor-meeting follow-up attention row into a real Student Directory handoff using the existing mentor_meeting_follow_up filter.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap, not speculative polish. The previous run already proved the exact mentor_meeting_follow_up Student Directory contract for Program Teacher, but Admin Command Center still left mentor-meeting follow-up as a passive summary row even though Global Admin already uses the same Student Directory surface for other exact-destination follow-up. Reusing that current filter contract stayed smaller and safer than another broader Global Admin refresh or a new admin-only meeting surface.
candidateShortlist: Broader Global Admin route refresh across Recent Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Global Admins can now open the existing Student Directory directly from the Admin Command Center mentor-meeting follow-up row instead of stopping at a summary-only attention card.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing protected /api/site/students route and exact mentor_meeting_follow_up filter instead of inventing a new admin-only meeting endpoint.
When no current school is selected, the existing Student Directory site-selection-required guidance still appears before any student records load.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
No new meeting fields, note visibility, or cross-school record access were introduced.

validation.notes: Focused admin-dashboard route, workspace, and dashboard-action verification passed before docs/state closeout, and the full validation ladder passed after the closeout files were updated. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

deferred: Filtered Audit cross-school proof still needs a tighter locally provable scenario before another audit-focused pass.
Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded mentor-meeting handoff slice.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Site selector follow-through still needs a broader cross-surface contract.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed runtime and audit-event writes.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Cross-site Programs behavior refresh is broader than this single Admin Command Center handoff.
Administration hosted read-only click-through refresh remains outside this local batch.
nextRecommended: Inspect filtered Audit cross-school proof next only if the current workspace can prove one exact local scenario; otherwise continue with another exact-destination Global Admin or role-workspace slice.
doNotRepeat: Do not regress the Admin Command Center mentor-meeting row back to summary-only while the existing Student Directory supports mentor_meeting_follow_up.
Do not remove the mentor-meeting follow-up handoff from /api/admin/dashboard while the current Student Directory filter and school-pick guidance already prove the exact destination.
Do not broaden Global Admin visibility beyond the current Student Directory, Review Queue, Audit, Programs, and Archive / Exports routes while deepening dashboard follow-up.
